pageContext.name: Stephen Curry SmALL-STARS
pageContext.description: Uniquely stylized collectible art, the Stephen Curry 2022 Golden State Warriors NBA Edition figure is a blend of urban street art and anime-influenced vinyl collectibles.  Only 500 figures were produced with the highest level of craftsmanship and attention to detail. The oversized, approximately 12-inch Stephen is an attractive, highly collectible, lifestyle product sure to make an immediate impression whether displayed in the home or at the office.The 2022 NBA Edition SmALL-STARS feature the new magnetic Wilson Official NBA Ball. The figure can be displayed with or without ball in hand!  Each limited edition unit is officially licensed by the NBA and individually numbered for collectors and fans alike! Be sure to add Stephen to your collection today!
